hero.subtitle: Quality you can see. Service that convinces. We turn your garden into your favourite place.

about.lead_strong: From small front yards to complete outdoor spaces
about.lead_rest: — we connect nature and living spaces into places where you feel at home.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Everything from one trusted partner — for private clients and businesses.

gartenpflege.name: Garden Care
gartenpflege.desc: Regular maintenance, mowing, weeding, fertilising — your garden stays at its best all year long.

pflasterarbeiten.name: Paving Works
pflasterarbeiten.desc: Driveways, paths and patios — precisely laid with high-quality materials.

heckenschnitt.name: Hedge Trimming
heckenschnitt.desc: Shape and maintenance cuts for hedges of all kinds. Clean, even, professional.

baumfaellung.name: Tree Felling
baumfaellung.desc: Safe felling and removal — even in tight spaces, with modern equipment.

rollrasen.name: Roll Lawn
rollrasen.desc: Instant green lawn. Preparation, installation and care instructions — all included.

winterdienst.name: Winter Service
winterdienst.desc: Snow clearing and gritting for private and commercial areas. Reliable even in the early morning.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project — we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
